name: openclaw-flint
description: Control your Android phone through Flint Hub's on-device MCP server. Tap, swipe, read screen, manage apps, send SMS, handle calls, and more. No laptop, USB or ADB needed.

host.description: Phone IP address where Flint Hub is running (e.g. 192.168.1.42)

authToken.description: Bearer token for authentication (must match Hub's configured token)

toolPrefix.description: Prefix all tool names with flint_ to avoid collisions
